Notice Of Motion And Motion For Leave To File First Amended Complaint
Off Calendar May-20-2021 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES:
Lafayette J. Clarke of POND NORTH LLP (213-617-6169), appearing through CourtCall for defendant Eaton Hydraulics LLC.

RULING:
Not contested and tentative ruling adopted: Plaintiff's Motion for Leave to File First Amended Complaint is GRANTED. No opposition filed. The First Amended Complaint is deemed served on all defendants who have previously appeared herein, as of the date of the granting of this motion. Order signed in open court. Judge: Cynthia Ming-mei Lee, Clerk: A. Mok. Not reported. (503/CML)
